theme_archetype.vibe: Mystical, editorial, artisanal, ghost-lab apothecary, warm and non-techy.

headings.usage: H1, H2, H3. Use for mystical, editorial feel. Tightly track large headings.

body.usage: Body text, buttons, labels. Provides clean contrast.

mono.usage: Use sparingly for small labels or 'code' aesthetic hints.

components.buttons: Rounded-full, solid charcoal or terracotta background, light text. Hover: slight scale and opacity change. Minimalist.
components.cards: Flat background (sand or white), 1px border (#D8D4CC), subtle inner glow, NO heavy shadows. Use soft rounded corners (rounded-2xl).
components.inputs: Underlined or subtle rounded-full borders. Not boxy SaaS inputs.
components.nav: Glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F4F1ED]/70) with 1px border-b border-[#D8D4CC].

motion_and_3d.scroll: MANDATORY: Use lenis for smooth scrolling to provide a premium feel.
motion_and_3d.framer_motion: Fade up and slow parallax on all major typography and imagery. Staggered reveals for lists and bento grids.
motion_and_3d.r3f: Use React Three Fiber. In the Hero, render the ghost mascot image on a floating plane (using Drei's <Float> and <Decal> or simple textured mesh) with gentle floating animation and soft ambient particles (<Sparkles>). The ghost must serve as the 3D focal point.
motion_and_3d.parallax: Use scroll-triggered parallax for background layers and floating elements.

sections_guide.description: 3D Hero Intro with animated ghost. Big serif typography 'Lunet Labz'. Waitlist input.
sections_guide.layout: Full height (min-h-screen). Asymmetrical. Ghost 3D scene on right, text on left.

sections_guide.description: Showcase Grid. Apps with download/webapp links.
sections_guide.layout: Bento grid (TETRIS mode). 1 large hero project, smaller side-by-side cards.

sections_guide.description: Why use Lunet Labz. Ethereal, mystical copy.
sections_guide.layout: Alternating left/right text blocks with ample whitespace.
Centered, warm terracotta accents. Coffee cup image.

media_assets.description: Bone-white soft ceramic ghost with </> mouth. Use in R3F Hero Canvas.
media_assets.instructions_to_main_agent: Load this image as a texture onto a R3F mesh (like a <Plane> or specialized shape) using useTexture. Add <Float> to give it 3D motion. Add soft lighting to blend it with the HTML background.

media_assets.description: Warm parchment paper texture. Use as a subtle blended background image for the body or specific sections.
media_assets.instructions_to_main_agent: Set as body background with background-size: cover, opacity around 30-50% and blend mode multiply/overlay against the #F4F1ED base color.

media_assets.description: Artisanal 3D coffee cup. Use in 'Buy us a coffee' section.
media_assets.instructions_to_main_agent: Use as a high-quality standard element with floating Framer Motion animation in the Buy Us A Coffee section.

media_assets.description: Organic ceramic shapes. Use as placeholder for project images.
media_assets.instructions_to_main_agent: Use this to fill out the project bento grid cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard SaaS fonts. Use Cormorant Garamond for headings and Outfit for body.
NO CYBERPUNK or TECHY themes. The vibe is 'Apothecary / Mystical Workshop'.
Integrate the generated ghost mascot image into the R3F scene. You can map it onto a plane geometry in R3F and use Drei's <Float> component to make it bob.
Add test IDs (data-testid) to all interactive elements.
For projects, use a 2D scroll grid with Framer Motion, triggered on scroll.
